questionHtml:
A long straight vertical conductor carries a current I upwards. An electron moves with horizontal speed v to the right.

What is the direction of the magnetic force on the electron?

A. Downwards

B. Upwards

C. Into the page

D. Out of the page

meta.title: A long straight vertical conductor carries a current I upwards. An electron moves with horizontal speed v to the right. What is the direction of the magnetic force on the electron?
